issues.title: CRITICAL - Spring AI BOM is missing dependencyManagement section
issues.body:
Last version of 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT in Spring AI BOM is missing dependency section effectively breaking builds trying to fetch latest latest module from the Spring Repo.

**Most likely the cause of the issue is the following commit:

https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/acd986e59c8b59ba3fc1c5ec89c75b3db3223f19**

1. removes configuration for flatten-maven-plugin (with custom parameters to preserve dependencyManagment section in the flatted pom)
2. most likely there is another flatten-maven-plugin in the reactor hierarchy that kicks in anyway and removes <dependencyManagement> section completely.

comments.body: Hi. Thanks for the report.  We are in the middle of adoptiong the approach spring cloud has for dependency management, which is that the spring cloud bom does not include any spring boot dependencies.  We will investigate, hang on! ;)

@alexheifetz Sorry about the issue. Fixed via https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/363ebf8de6acd2f6f48e917e9aa27909d32d3066 to keep the right configuration for dependencyManagement. Could you give the latest Spring AI BOM a try (once the current CI build is complete) and let us know how it goes? Thank you
Issue has been resolved. Thanks for prompt response!!

> Hi. Thanks for the report. We are in the middle of adoptiong the approach spring cloud has for dependency management, which is that the spring cloud bom does not include any spring boot dependencies. We will investigate, hang on! ;)


> Hi. Thanks for the report. We are in the middle of adoptiong the approach spring cloud has for dependency management, which is that the spring cloud bom does not include any spring boot dependencies. We will investigate, hang on! ;)

Knowing Dave, there is probably flatten-maven-plugin configuration sitting somewhere in the spring-cloud-build that requires customization at the child level.

issues.title: MilvusSearchRequest.nativeExpression is not useable in QuestionAnswerAdvisor
issues.body:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b90234a7-9ebd-40e0-8f30-2f3535afe8a2)
MilvusSearchRequest,nativeExpression  and  MilvusSearchRequest.searchParamsJson  use in the QuestionAnswerAdvisor  is no effect

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/152f98bd-795e-4cb8-a57c-afa0edc17f90)
because the MilvusSearchRequest transform  to common SearchRequest by SearchRequest.from() ,but use SearchRequest.from() method   lose nativeExpression  and searchParamsJson

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ea691e24-9f51-4aa6-b5a5-bd5e1b9bb626)

issues.title: Support for Huggingface Text Embeddings Inference (TEI)
issues.body:
I am trying to deploy bge embedding models without using ollama for various reasons.

I had one deployed using TEI https://huggingface.co/docs/text-embeddings-inference/local_cpu which, if I understand correctly, is not currently supported by Spring AI natively. 

The other workaround is using spring-ai-starter-model-transformers where I encountered the "Required array size too large" issue of
https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/issues/21321


I wonder if Text Embeddings Inference (TEI) of huggingface will be supported by Spring AI in the future.

comments.body: Never mind. TEI is just another OpenAI Embedding and is already supported.
